title: Apply provider runtime state to simplified model picker
goal: Ensure simplified model picker routes preserve provider cooldown/backpressure metadata instead of dropping runtime state while rebuilding synthetic routes.
completionConditions: Simplified local model picker routes apply the same provider runtime state decoration as MultiProvider::model_routes.
OpenAI synthetic picker routes show cooldown/backpressure details when provider runtime gates are active.
The decoration helper remains shared so route metadata semantics do not diverge between full route loading and simplified picker paths.
Focused tests, cargo fmt/check, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit/push, and issue #27 update pass.
notes: Follow-up to 0b3c6473 and 8cff8ae8. The full provider model_routes path is decorated, but simplified_model_routes_for_picker builds synthetic routes and currently returns them undecorated.
